[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00001010 2
6 10000111 4
7 00100010 2

01 10 00001111 4
12 21 00001010 2 match 5
23 32 00000010 1
34 43 01000110 3
45 54 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4
56 65 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4
67 76 00010000 1
70 07 00010100 2

02 20 00001010 2 match 5
13 31 10000111 4 match 6
24 42 00100010 2 match 7
35 53 00000001 1
46 64 00010000 1
57 75 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4
60 06 00011000 2
71 17 00000100 1

03 30 00000111 3
14 41 00000110 2
25 52 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4
36 63 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4
47 74 01110100 4
50 05 00000001 1
61 16 00001000 1
72 27 00100000 1

04 40 00010110 3
15 51 00000001 1
26 62 00001000 1
37 73 01000100 2
